'''Namrhe''' was originally from [[Bestine IV/Legends|Bestine IV]] but became a nomad when the population were driven from their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] and joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] soon after. Serving aboard the [[Mon Calamari Star Cruiser/Legends|Mon Calamari Star Cruiser]] [[Independence/Legends|''Independence'']], Namrhe was a talented [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] described by the others as "[[LTS|likely to survive]]."<ref name="XWOSG" />

Namrhe was chosen by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] to serve as his [[Wingmate/Legends|wingman]], along with [[Omin-Oreh]], for a seemingly routine escort mission. The three [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] pilots would fly [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighters]], defending the [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] [[Hunter (Lambda-class)|''Hunter'']] while it [[Battle of the Corellian system|captured]] an Imperial [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] carrying officers to the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|Death Star]].<ref name="XWOSG" /><ref name="XW" />

The Y-wings launched at 0455 hours and by 0547, Namrhe was dead, killed while protecting Farlander from Imperial [[TIE series/Legends|fighters]] launched from the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] ''[[Immortal/Legends|Immortal]]'' as he attempted to prevent the transport's recapture.<ref name="XWOSG" />
